tEn: Large Batch Training of Convolutional Networks
tZh: 卷积网络的大批量训练
sEn: Layer-wise Adaptive Rate Scaling (LARS) enables large batch training of convolutional networks without accuracy loss.
sZh: 逐层自适应学习率缩放（LARS）使得卷积网络的大批量训练在不损失精度的情况下成为可能。
absEn: A common way to speed up training of large convolutional networks is to add computational units. Training is then performed using data-parallel synchronous Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) with mini-batch divided between computational units. With an increase in the number of nodes, the batch size grows. But training with large batch size often results in the lower model accuracy. We argue that the current recipe for large batch training (linear learning rate scaling with warm-up) is not general enough and training may diverge. To overcome this optimization difficulties we propose a new training algorithm based on Layer-wise Adaptive Rate Scaling (LARS). Using LARS, we scaled Alexnet up to a batch size of 8K, and Resnet-50 to a batch size of 32K without loss in accuracy.
absZh: 加速大型卷积网络训练的常见方法是增加计算单元。训练时采用数据并行的同步随机梯度下降（SGD），小批量数据被分配到各个计算单元。随着节点数量增加，批量大小也随之增长。但大批量训练往往导致模型精度下降。我们认为当前的大批量训练方案（线性学习率缩放加预热）不够通用，训练可能发散。为克服这些优化困难，我们提出了一种基于逐层自适应学习率缩放（LARS）的新训练算法。使用LARS，我们将Alexnet扩展到8K的批量大小，ResNet-50扩展到32K的批量大小，且未损失精度。

contrib.en: Proposes Layer-wise Adaptive Rate Scaling (LARS) for large batch training.
contrib.zh: 提出逐层自适应速率缩放（LARS）用于大规模批量训练。

contrib.en: Shows LARS enables AlexNet training with batch size 8K and ResNet-50 with 32K without accuracy loss.
contrib.zh: 展示LARS使AlexNet在批量大小8K、ResNet-50在32K下训练且无精度损失。

contrib.en: Identifies that the ratio of weight norm to gradient norm varies across layers, motivating layer-wise learning rates.
contrib.zh: 发现权重范数与梯度范数之比在各层间变化，从而启发逐层学习率。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that batch normalization helps stabilize large learning rate training but is insufficient alone.
contrib.zh: 证明批归一化有助于稳定大学习率训练，但单独使用不足。

contrib.en: Shows that accuracy loss for very large batches can be recovered by training longer.
contrib.zh: 表明极大批量的精度损失可通过延长训练来恢复。

contrib.en: Provides empirical evidence that the generalization gap is not the main cause of accuracy loss for large batches.
contrib.zh: 提供经验证据表明泛化差距并非大批量精度损失的主因。

limits.en: LARS requires tuning the trust coefficient η, which may vary across models.
limits.zh: LARS需要调整信任系数η，该系数可能因模型而异。

limits.en: Experiments limited to AlexNet and ResNet-50 on ImageNet; generalizability to other architectures is unknown.
limits.zh: 实验仅限于ImageNet上的AlexNet和ResNet-50，对其他架构的泛化性未知。

limits.en: Training with batch size above 32K still results in accuracy loss without longer training.
limits.zh: 批量大小超过32K时，若不延长训练仍会出现精度损失。

limits.en: The method does not address the computational cost of large batch training itself.
limits.zh: 该方法未解决大批量训练本身的计算成本问题。

limits.en: Comparison baselines may not reflect state-of-the-art due to limited data augmentation and single-crop testing.
limits.zh: 由于数据增强有限和单裁剪测试，对比基线可能未反映最先进水平。

items.en: A common way to speed up training of large convolutional networks is to add computational units. Training is then performed using data-parallel synchronous Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) with mini-batch divided between computational units. With an increase in the number of nodes, the batch size grows. But training with large batch size often results in the lower model accuracy. We argue that the current recipe for large batch training (linear learning rate scaling with warm-up) is not general enough and training may diverge. To overcome this optimization difficulties we propose a new training algorithm based on Layer-wise Adaptive Rate Scaling (LARS). Using LARS, we scaled Alexnet up to a batch size of 8K, and Resnet-50 to a batch size of 32K without loss in accuracy.
items.zh: 加速大型卷积网络训练的一种常见方法是增加计算单元。然后使用数据并行同步随机梯度下降（SGD）进行训练，其中小批量数据被划分到各个计算单元之间。随着节点数量的增加，批量大小也随之增长。但使用大批量训练通常会导致模型精度降低。我们认为当前的大批量训练方案（线性学习率缩放加预热）不够通用，训练可能会发散。为了克服这些优化困难，我们提出了一种基于逐层自适应速率缩放（LARS）的新训练算法。使用LARS，我们将Alexnet扩展到8K的批量大小，将Resnet-50扩展到32K的批量大小，且没有精度损失。

items.en: Training of large Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) takes a lot of time. The brute-force way to speed up CNN training is to add more computational power (e.g. more GPU nodes) and train network using data-parallel Stochastic Gradient Descent, where each worker receives some chunk of global mini-batch (see e.g. Krizhevsky (2014) or Goyal et al. (2017) ). The size of a chunk should be large enough to utilize the computational resources of the worker. So scaling up the number of workers results in the increase of batch size. But using large batch may negatively impact the model accuracy, as was observed in Krizhevsky (2014), Li et al. (2014), Keskar et al. (2016), Hoffer et al. (2017),..
items.zh: 大型卷积神经网络（CNN）的训练非常耗时。加速CNN训练的暴力方法是增加更多的计算能力（例如更多的GPU节点），并使用数据并行随机梯度下降进行训练，其中每个工作节点接收全局小批量的一部分（参见例如Krizhevsky (2014)或Goyal et al. (2017)）。每个部分的大小应足够大以充分利用工作节点的计算资源。因此，增加工作节点数量会导致批量大小增加。但使用大批量可能会对模型精度产生负面影响，正如Krizhevsky (2014)、Li et al. (2014)、Keskar et al. (2016)、Hoffer et al. (2017)等人所观察到的。

items.en: Increasing the global batch while keeping the same number of epochs means that you have fewer iterations to update weights. The straight-forward way to compensate for a smaller number of iterations is to do larger steps by increasing the learning rate (LR). For example, Krizhevsky (2014) suggests to linearly scale up LR with batch size. However using a larger LR makes optimization more difficult, and networks may diverge especially during the initial phase. To overcome this difficulty, Goyal et al. (2017) suggested doing a "learning rate warm-up": training starts with a small "safe" LR, which is slowly increased to the target "base" LR. With a LR warm-up and a linear scaling rule, Goyal et al. (2017) successfully trained Resnet-50 with batch B=8K (see also Cho et al. (2017)). Linear scaling of LR with a warm-up is the "state-of-the art" recipe for large batch training.
items.zh: 在保持相同epoch数量的情况下增加全局批量意味着用于更新权重的迭代次数更少。补偿迭代次数减少的直接方法是通过增加学习率（LR）来迈出更大的步长。例如，Krizhevsky (2014)建议将LR与批量大小线性缩放。然而，使用更大的LR会使优化更加困难，网络可能会发散，尤其是在初始阶段。为了克服这一困难，Goyal et al. (2017)建议进行“学习率预热”：训练从一个小的“安全”LR开始，然后缓慢增加到目标“基础”LR。通过LR预热和线性缩放规则，Goyal et al. (2017)成功训练了批量B=8K的Resnet-50（另见Cho et al. (2017)）。带有预热的LR线性缩放是大批量训练的“最先进”方案。

items.en: We tried to apply this linear scaling and warm-up scheme to train Alexnet on Imagenet (Deng et al. (2009)), but scaling stopped after B=2K since training diverged for large LR-s. For B=4K the accuracy dropped from the baseline 57.6% ( for B=256) to 53.1%, and for B=8K the accuracy decreased to 44.8%. To enable training with a large LR, we replaced Local Response Normalization layers in Alexnet with Batch Normalization (BN). We will refer to this modification of AlexNet as AlexNet-BN throughout the rest of the paper. BN improved both model convergence for large LR as well as accuracy: for B=8K the accuracy gap was decreased from 14% to 2.2%.
items.zh: 我们尝试应用这种线性缩放和预热方案在Imagenet上训练Alexnet（Deng et al. (2009)），但缩放止步于B=2K，因为训练在较大的LR下发散。对于B=4K，精度从基线57.6%（B=256）下降到53.1%，对于B=8K，精度下降到44.8%。为了能够使用较大的LR进行训练，我们将Alexnet中的局部响应归一化层替换为批量归一化（BN）。在本文的其余部分，我们将这种修改后的AlexNet称为AlexNet-BN。BN改善了模型在较大LR下的收敛性和精度：对于B=8K，精度差距从14%缩小到2.2%。

items.en: To analyze the training stability with large LRs we measured the ratio between the norm of the layer weights and norm of gradients update. We observed that if this ratio is too high, the training may become unstable. On other hand, if the ratio is too small, then weights don’t change fast enough. This ratio varies a lot between different layers, which makes it necessary to use a separate LR for each layer. Thus we propose a novel Layer-wise Adaptive Rate Scaling (LARS) algorithm. There are two notable differences between LARS and other adaptive algorithms such as ADAM (Kingma & Ba (2014)) or RMSProp (Tieleman & Hinton (2012)): first, LARS uses a separate learning rate for each layer and not for each weight, which leads to better stability. And second, the magnitude of the update is controlled with respect to the weight norm for better control of training speed. With LARS we trained Alexnet-BN and Resnet-50 with B=32K without accuracy loss.
items.zh: 为了分析使用较大LR时的训练稳定性，我们测量了层权重范数与梯度更新范数之间的比率。我们观察到，如果这个比率过高，训练可能会变得不稳定。另一方面，如果比率过小，则权重变化不够快。这个比率在不同层之间变化很大，因此有必要为每一层使用单独的LR。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的逐层自适应速率缩放（LARS）算法。LARS与其他自适应算法（如ADAM（Kingma & Ba (2014)）或RMSProp（Tieleman & Hinton (2012)））有两个显著区别：首先，LARS为每一层使用单独的学习率，而不是每个权重，这带来了更好的稳定性。其次，更新的幅度相对于权重范数进行控制，以便更好地控制训练速度。使用LARS，我们训练了Alexnet-BN和Resnet-50，批量大小达到32K，且没有精度损失。

items.en: The training of CNN is done using Stochastic Gradient (SG) based methods. At each step t𝑡t a mini-batch of B𝐵B samples xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} is selected from the training set. The gradients of loss function ∇L​(xi,w)∇𝐿subscript𝑥𝑖𝑤\nabla L(x_{i},w) are computed for this subset, and networks weights w𝑤w are updated based on this stochastic gradient:
items.zh: CNN的训练使用基于随机梯度（SG）的方法。在每个步骤t，从训练集中选择包含B个样本xi的小批量。计算该子集的损失函数梯度∇L(xi,w)，并根据该随机梯度更新网络权重w：

items.en: The computation of SG can be done in parallel by N𝑁N units, where each unit processes a chunk of the mini-batch with BN𝐵𝑁\frac{B}{N} samples. Increasing the mini-batch permits scaling to more nodes without reducing the workload on each unit. However, it was observed that training with a large batch is difficult. To maintain the network accuracy, it is necessary to carefully adjust training hyper-parameters (learning rate, momentum etc).
items.zh: SG的计算可以由N个单元并行完成，每个单元处理包含B/N个样本的小批量数据块。增加小批量允许扩展到更多节点而不减少每个单元的工作负载。然而，观察到使用大批量训练是困难的。为了保持网络精度，需要仔细调整训练超参数（学习率、动量等）。

items.en: Krizhevsky (2014) suggested the following rules for training with large batches: when you increase the batch B𝐵B by k𝑘k, you should also increase LR by k𝑘k while keeping other hyper-parameters (momentum, weight decay, etc) unchanged. The logic behind linear LR scaling is straight-forward: if you increase B𝐵B by k𝑘k while keeping the number of epochs unchanged, you will do k𝑘k fewer steps. So it seems natural to increase the step size by k𝑘k. For example, let’s take k=2𝑘2k=2. The weight updates for batch size B𝐵B after 2 iterations would be:
items.zh: Krizhevsky (2014)提出了以下大批量训练规则：当批量B增加k倍时，也应将LR增加k倍，同时保持其他超参数（动量、权重衰减等）不变。线性LR缩放背后的逻辑很直接：如果增加B k倍而保持epoch数量不变，则迭代次数将减少k倍。因此，将步长增加k倍似乎是自然的。例如，取k=2。批量大小为B时经过2次迭代后的权重更新为：

items.en: The weight update for the batch B2=2∗Bsubscript𝐵22𝐵B_{2}=2*B with learning rate λ2subscript𝜆2\lambda_{2}:
items.zh: 批量大小为B2=2*B且学习率为λ2时的权重更新为：

items.en: will be similar if you take λ2=2∗λsubscript𝜆22𝜆\lambda_{2}=2*\lambda, assuming that ∇L(xj,wt+1)≈L(xj,wt\nabla L(x_{j},w_{t+1})\approx L(x_{j},w_{t}) .
items.zh: 如果取λ2=2*λ，并假设∇L(xj,wt+1)≈∇L(xj,wt)，则两者相似。

items.en: Using the "linear LR scaling" Krizhevsky (2014) trained AlexNet with batch B=1K with minor (≈1%absentpercent1\approx 1\%) accuracy loss. The scaling of Alexnet above 2K is difficult, since the training diverges for larger LRs. It was observed that linear scaling works much better for networks with Batch Normalization (e.g. Codreanu et al. (2017)). For example Chen et al. (2016) trained the Inception model with batch B=6400, and Li (2017) trained Resnet-152 for B=5K.
items.zh: 使用“线性LR缩放”，Krizhevsky (2014)训练了批量B=1K的AlexNet，精度损失很小（约1%）。Alexnet扩展到2K以上很困难，因为训练在较大LR下会发散。观察到线性缩放对于带有批量归一化的网络效果更好（例如Codreanu et al. (2017)）。例如，Chen et al. (2016)训练了批量B=6400的Inception模型，Li (2017)训练了批量B=5K的Resnet-152。

items.en: The main obstacle for scaling up batch is the instability of training with high LR. Hoffer et al. (2017) tried to use less aggressive "square root scaling" of LR with special form of Batch Normalization ("Ghost Batch Normalization") to train Alexnet with B=8K, but still the accuracy (53.93%) was much worse than baseline 58%. To overcome the instability during initial phase, Goyal et al. (2017) proposed to use LR warm-up: training starts with small LR, and then LR is gradually increased to the target. After the warm-up period (usually a few epochs), you switch to the regular LR policy ("multi-steps", polynomial decay etc). Using LR warm-up and linear scaling Goyal et al. (2017) trained Resnet-50 with batch B=8K without loss in accuracy. These recipes constitute the current state-of-the-art for large batch training, and we used them as the starting point of our experiments
items.zh: 扩展批量的主要障碍是使用高LR时训练的不稳定性。Hoffer et al. (2017)尝试使用较不激进的“平方根缩放”LR，并结合特殊形式的批量归一化（“Ghost Batch Normalization”）来训练批量B=8K的Alexnet，但精度（53.93%）仍远低于基线58%。为了克服初始阶段的不稳定性，Goyal et al. (2017)提出了LR预热：训练从小LR开始，然后逐渐增加到目标LR。在预热期（通常几个epoch）之后，切换到常规LR策略（“多步”、多项式衰减等）。使用LR预热和线性缩放，Goyal et al. (2017)成功训练了批量B=8K的Resnet-50，且没有精度损失。这些方案构成了当前大批量训练的最先进技术，我们将其作为实验的起点。

items.en: Another problem related to large batch training is so called "generalization gap", observed by Keskar et al. (2016). They came to conclusion that "the lack of generalization ability is due to the fact that large-batch methods tend to converge to sharp minimizers of the training function." They tried a few methods to improve the generalization with data augmentation and warm-starting with small batch, but they did not find a working solution.
items.zh: 与大批量训练相关的另一个问题是所谓的“泛化差距”，由Keskar et al. (2016)观察到。他们得出结论：“泛化能力的缺乏是由于大批量方法倾向于收敛到训练函数的尖锐极小值。”他们尝试了几种方法，通过数据增强和小批量预热启动来改善泛化，但没有找到可行的解决方案。

full.sec: 3 Analysis of Alexnet training with large batch

items.en: We used BVLC111https://github.com/BVLC/caffe/tree/master/models/bvlc_alexnet Alexnet with batch B=512 as baseline. Model was trained using SGD with momentum 0.9 with initial LR=0.01 and the polynomial (power=2) decay LR policy for 100 epochs. The baseline accuracy is 58% (averaged over last 5 epochs). Next we tried to train Alexnet with B=4K by using larger LR. In our experiments we changed the base LR from 0.01 to 0.08, but training diverged with LR > 0.06 even with warm-up 222LR starts from 0.001 and is linearly increased it to the target LR during 2.5 epochs. The best accuracy for B=4K is 53.1%, achieved for LR=0.05. For B=8K we couldn’t scale-up LR either, and the best accuracy is 44.8% , achieved for LR=0.03 (see Table 1(a) ).
items.zh: 我们使用BVLC Alexnet（批量B=512）作为基线。模型使用SGD训练，动量0.9，初始LR=0.01，多项式（power=2）衰减LR策略，共100个epoch。基线精度为58%（最后5个epoch的平均值）。接下来，我们尝试通过使用更大的LR来训练批量B=4K的Alexnet。在我们的实验中，我们将基础LR从0.01更改为0.08，但训练在LR>0.06时发散，即使使用了预热。B=4K的最佳精度为53.1%，在LR=0.05时获得。对于B=8K，我们也无法扩大LR，最佳精度为44.8%，在LR=0.03时获得（见表1(a)）。

items.en: To stabilize the initial training phase we replaced Local Response Normalization layers with Batch Normalization (BN). We will refer to this model as Alexnet-BN 333 https://github.com/borisgin/nvcaffe-0.16/tree/caffe-0.16/models/alexnet_bn. The baseline accuracy for Alexnet-BN with B=512 is 60.2%. 444 Alexnet-BN baseline was trained using SGD with momentum=0.9, weight decay=0.0005 for 128 epochs. We used polynomial (power 2) decay LR policy with base LR=0.02. With BN we could use large LR-s even without warm-up. For B=4K the best accuracy 58.9% was achieved for LR=0.18, and for B=8K the best accuracy 58% was achieved for LR=0.3. We also observed that BN significantly widen the range of LRs with good accuracy.
items.zh: 为了稳定初始训练阶段，我们将局部响应归一化层替换为批量归一化（BN）。我们将此模型称为Alexnet-BN。批量B=512的Alexnet-BN基线精度为60.2%。使用BN，我们甚至可以在没有预热的情况下使用较大的LR。对于B=4K，最佳精度58.9%在LR=0.18时获得；对于B=8K，最佳精度58%在LR=0.3时获得。我们还观察到，BN显著拓宽了具有良好精度的LR范围。

items.en: Still there is a 2.2%percent2.22.2\% accuracy loss for B=8K. To check if it is related to the "generalization gap" (Keskar et al. (2016)), we looked at the loss gap between training and testing (see Fig. 1). We did not find the significant difference in the loss gap between B=256 and B=8K. We conclude that in this case the accuracy loss is not related to a generalization gap, and it is caused by the low training.
items.zh: 然而，对于B=8K，仍有2.2%的精度损失。为了检查这是否与“泛化差距”有关（Keskar et al. (2016)），我们观察了训练和测试之间的损失差距（见图1）。我们没有发现B=256和B=8K之间损失差距的显著差异。我们得出结论，在这种情况下，精度损失与泛化差距无关，而是由训练不足引起的。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Alexnet-BN: Gap between training and testing loss
items.capZh: 图1：Alexnet-BN：训练和测试损失之间的差距

items.en:
The standard SGD uses the same LR λ𝜆\lambda for all layers: wt+1=wt−λ​∇L​(wt)subscript𝑤𝑡1subscript𝑤𝑡𝜆∇𝐿subscript𝑤𝑡w_{t+1}=w_{t}-\lambda
abla L(w_{t}). When λ𝜆\lambda is large, the update ‖λ∗∇L​(wt)‖norm𝜆∇𝐿subscript𝑤𝑡||\lambda*
abla L(w_{t})|| can become larger than ‖w‖norm𝑤||w||, and this can cause the divergence. This makes the initial phase of training highly sensitive to the weight initialization and to initial LR. We found that the ratio the L2-norm of weights and gradients ‖w‖/‖∇L​(wt)‖norm𝑤norm∇𝐿subscript𝑤𝑡||w||/||
abla L(w_{t})|| varies significantly between weights and biases, and between different layers. For example, let’s take AlexNet-BN after one iteration (Table 2, "*.w" means layer weights, and "*.b" - biases). The ratio ‖w‖/‖∇L​(w)‖norm𝑤norm∇𝐿𝑤||w||/||
abla L(w)|| for the 1st convolutional layer ("conv1.w") is 5.76, and for the last fully connected layer ("fc6.w") - 1345.
items.zh: 标准SGD对所有层使用相同的LR λ：wt+1 = wt - λ∇L(wt)。当λ较大时，更新‖λ*∇L(wt)‖可能变得大于‖w‖，这可能导致发散。这使得训练的初始阶段对权重初始化和初始LR高度敏感。我们发现权重和梯度的L2范数之比‖w‖/‖∇L(wt)‖在权重和偏置之间以及不同层之间变化显著。例如，以AlexNet-BN经过一次迭代后为例（表2，“*.w”表示层权重，“*.b”表示偏置）。第一个卷积层（“conv1.w”）的比率‖w‖/‖∇L(w)‖为5.76，而最后一个全连接层（“fc6.w”）为1345。

items.en: The ratio is high during the initial phase, and it is rapidly decrease after few epochs (see Figure 2). If LR is large comparing to the ratio for some layer, then training may becomes unstable. The LR "warm-up" attempts to overcome this difficulty by starting from small LR, which can be safely used for all layers, and then slowly increasing it until weights will grow up enough to use larger LRs.
items.zh: 该比率在初始阶段较高，并在几个epoch后迅速下降（见图2）。如果LR相对于某些层的比率较大，则训练可能变得不稳定。LR“预热”试图通过从小LR开始来克服这一困难，该LR可以安全地用于所有层，然后缓慢增加，直到权重增长到足以使用更大的LR。

items.en: We would like to use different approach. We use local LR λlsuperscript𝜆𝑙\lambda^{l} for each layer l𝑙l:
items.zh: 我们希望使用不同的方法。我们为每一层l使用局部LR λl：

items.en: where γ𝛾\gamma is a global LR. Local LR λlsuperscript𝜆𝑙\lambda^{l} is defined for each layer through "trust" coefficient η<1𝜂1\eta<1:
items.zh: 其中 γ 是全局学习率。局部学习率 λ^l 通过“信任”系数 η<1 为每一层定义：

items.en: The η𝜂\eta defines how much we trust the layer to change its weights during one update 555 One can consider LARS as a private case of block-diagonal re-scaling from Lafond et al. (2017). . Note that now the magnitude of the update for each layer doesn’t depend on the magnitude of the gradient anymore, so it helps to partially eliminate vanishing and exploding gradient problems. This definition can be easily extended for SGD to balance the local learning rate and the weight decay term β𝛽\beta:
items.zh: η 定义了在一次更新中我们信任该层改变其权重的程度。注意，现在每一层更新的幅度不再依赖于梯度的幅度，因此有助于部分消除梯度消失和梯度爆炸问题。这个定义可以很容易地扩展到 SGD，以平衡局部学习率和权重衰减项 β：

items.en: The network training for SGD with LARS are summarized in the Algorithm 1. One can find more implementation details at https://github.com/borisgin/nvcaffe-0.16
items.zh: 使用 LARS 的 SGD 网络训练总结在算法 1 中。更多实现细节可以在 https://github.com/borisgin/nvcaffe-0.16 找到。

items.en: The local LR strongly depends on the layer and batch size (see Figure. 2 )
items.zh: 局部学习率强烈依赖于层和批量大小（见图 2）。

items.en: We re-trained Alexnet and Alexnet-BN with LARS for batches up to 32K 666 Models have been trained for 100 epochs using SGD with momentum=0.9, weight decay=0.0005, polynomial (p=2) decay LR policy, and LARS coefficient η=0.001𝜂0.001\eta=0.001. Training have been done on NVIDIA DGX1. To emulate large batches (B=16K and 32K) we used i​t​e​r​_​s​i​z​e𝑖𝑡𝑒𝑟_𝑠𝑖𝑧𝑒iter\_size parameter to partition mini-batch into smaller chunks. The weights update is done after gradients for the last chunk are computed. . For B=8K the accuracy of both networks matched the baseline B=512 (see Figure 3). Alexnet-BN trained with B=16K lost 0.9% in accuracy, and trained with B=32K lost 2.6%.
items.zh: 我们使用 LARS 重新训练了 Alexnet 和 Alexnet-BN，批量大小高达 32K。模型使用 SGD 训练了 100 个 epoch，动量=0.9，权重衰减=0.0005，多项式（p=2）衰减学习率策略，LARS 系数 η=0.001。训练在 NVIDIA DGX1 上进行。为了模拟大批量（B=16K 和 32K），我们使用 iter_size 参数将小批量分成更小的块。在计算完最后一个块的梯度后更新权重。对于 B=8K，两个网络的准确率与基线 B=512 相匹配（见图 3）。使用 B=16K 训练的 Alexnet-BN 准确率下降了 0.9%，使用 B=32K 训练的准确率下降了 2.6%。

items.en: There is a relatively wide interval of base LRs which gives the "best" accuracy. for example, for Alexnet-BN with B=16K LRs from [13;22] give the accuracy ≈59.3absent59.3\approx 59.3, for B=32k, LRs from [17,28] give ≈57.5absent57.5\approx 57.5
items.zh: 存在一个相对较宽的基础学习率区间，可以给出“最佳”准确率。例如，对于 Alexnet-BN，B=16K 时，学习率在 [13;22] 范围内给出约 59.3% 的准确率；对于 B=32K，学习率在 [17,28] 范围内给出约 57.5% 的准确率。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Alexnet-BN, B=16K and 32k: Accuracy as function of LR
items.capZh: 图 4：Alexnet-BN，B=16K 和 32K：准确率作为学习率的函数

items.en: Next we retrained Resnet-50, ver.1 from He et al. (2016) with LARS. As a baseline we used B=256 with corresponding top-1 accuracy 73%. 777 Note that our baseline 73% is lower than the published state-of-the-art 75% Goyal et al. (2017) and Cho et al. (2017) for few reasons. We trained with the minimal data augmentation (pre-scale images to 256x256 and use random 224x224 crop with horizontal flip). During testing we used one model and 1 central crop. The state-of-the art accuracy 75% was achieved with more extensive data augmentation during testing, and with multi-model, multi-crop testing. For more details see log files https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/∼similar-to\simyouyang/publications/batch.
items.zh: 接下来，我们使用 LARS 重新训练了 He 等人 (2016) 的 ResNet-50 版本 1。作为基线，我们使用了 B=256，对应的 top-1 准确率为 73%。注意，我们的基线 73% 低于已发表的最先进结果 75%（Goyal 等人，2017；Cho 等人，2017），原因有几个。我们使用了最小的数据增强（将图像预缩放到 256x256，并使用随机 224x224 裁剪和水平翻转）。测试时，我们使用了一个模型和一个中心裁剪。最先进的 75% 准确率是通过更广泛的数据增强以及多模型、多裁剪测试实现的。更多细节请参见日志文件 https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~youyang/publications/batch。

items.en: All networks have been trained using SGD with momentum 0.9 and weight decay=0.0001 for 90 epochs. We used LARS and warm-up for 5 epochs with polynomial decay (power=2) LR policy.
items.zh: 所有网络均使用 SGD 训练，动量=0.9，权重衰减=0.0001，共 90 个 epoch。我们使用了 LARS 和 5 个 epoch 的预热，学习率策略为多项式衰减（幂=2）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Scaling ResNet-50 up to B=32K with LARS.
items.capZh: 图 5：使用 LARS 将 ResNet-50 扩展到 B=32K。

items.en: We found that with LARS we can scale up Resnet-50 up to batch B=32K with almost the same (-0.7%) accuracy as baseline
items.zh: 我们发现，使用 LARS，我们可以将 ResNet-50 扩展到批量大小 B=32K，准确率与基线几乎相同（下降 0.7%）。

full.sec: 6 Large Batch vs Number of steps

items.en: As one can see from Alexnet-BN exmaple for B=32K, even training with LARS and using large LR does not reach baseline accuracy. But the accuracy can be recovered completely by just training longer. We argue that when batch very large, the stochastic gradients become very close to true gradients, so increasing the batch does not give much additional gradient information comparing to smaller batches.
items.zh: 从 Alexnet-BN 在 B=32K 的例子可以看出，即使使用 LARS 和大学习率训练，也无法达到基线准确率。但通过延长训练时间，准确率可以完全恢复。我们认为，当批量非常大时，随机梯度非常接近真实梯度，因此增加批量相比小批量并不能提供更多的梯度信息。

items.en: Large batch is a key for scaling up training of convolutional networks. The existing approach for large-batch training, based on using large learning rates, leads to divergence, especially during the initial phase, even with learning rate warm-up. To solve these optimization difficulties we proposed the new algorithm, which adapts the learning rate for each layer (LARS). Using LARS, we extended scaling of Alexnet and Resnet-50 to B=32K. Training of these networks with batch above 32K without accuracy loss is still open problem.
items.zh: 大批量是扩展卷积网络训练的关键。现有的基于使用大学习率的大批量训练方法，即使使用学习率预热，也会导致发散，尤其是在初始阶段。为了解决这些优化困难，我们提出了一种新算法，该算法为每一层自适应调整学习率（LARS）。使用 LARS，我们将 Alexnet 和 ResNet-50 的扩展规模提高到了 B=32K。在无准确率损失的情况下，将这些网络的批量扩展到 32K 以上仍然是一个开放问题。
